brawn_tt-u: Use brawn for all actions that require physical effort
endure-u: ENDUREHandle pain, keep going despite exhaustion, hold your liquor
fight-u: FIGHTFight enemies bare handed or in close quarters
force-u: FORCEHoist, push, pull, or break things
stunt-u: STUNTJump or run recklessly, dodge bullets
nerves_tt-u: You need nerves of steel for actions that require quick reflexes and steady hands
cool-u: COOLKeep your cool, hold still, or show courage
drive-u: DRIVEDrive a car or bike, pilot a plane or helicopter
shoot-u: SHOOTShoot with guns or superpowers, throw objects with precision
survival-u: SURVIVALFind your bearings in the wilds, improvise weapons or shelter, hunt your dinner
smooth_tt-u: Show off how smooth you are whenever you have to interact with other people or want to manipulate them
flirt-u: FLIRTSeduce someone or use your charm
leadership-u: LEADERSHIPInspire, give orders, or intimidate people
speech-u: SPEECHPersuade or deceive someone, or carry out negotiations
style-u: STYLEShow style and elegance, clean up nice, or prove your artistic talent
focus_tt-u: You’ll need focus to concentrate, to notice details, and to recall memories and knowledge
detect-u: DETECTFind clues and intel, notice details, sniff out lies
fix-u: FIXRepair a mechanism or vehicle, deactivate a trap
heal-u: HEALGive first aid or comfort someone
know-u: KNOWRemember information you learned, recall details and other useful knowledge
crime_tt-u: Your aptitude for crime will come in handy when acting in secret or to notice incoming threats
awareness-u: AWARENESSKeep your eyes and ears open, notice incoming threats
dexterity-u: DEXTERITYPerform sleight of hand, steal something, pick a lock
stealth-u: STEALTHHide, sneak, or move quietly
streetwise-u: STREETWISEInteract with criminals, recall information useful for moving in seedy neighborhoods or dealing with organized crime
grit-u: GRITGrit is what makes you a Hero. When anyone else would run in panic, surrender, or give up hope, Grit allows you to get back up and keep fighting for what you believe in.
power-u:
POWERWhen you get a success against all odds, when you make a great sacrifice, when you evoke a strong emotional response from the group, or when you’re at the center of an epic and captivating scene, the Director can reward you with Power (⚡︎), up to 6 points.
You can spend Power to gain several advantages:

︎⚡︎: Spend 1 Power to gain +1 to an Action or Reaction Roll.
⚡︎ ︎: Spend 1 Power to activate a Feat or Superpower.
⚡︎ ︎: Spend 1 or more Power to Show Off your Superpower.
⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎ : Spend 6 Power to immediately get a Spotlight.
luck-u:
LUCK!You can spend your Luck to gain several advantages:

⚡︎: Spend 1 Luck gain +1 to an Action or Reaction Roll.
⚡︎: Spend 1 Luck to activate the special ability of some Feats.
⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎⚡︎: Spend 6 Luck to immediately gain a Spotlight.
adrenalinetext-u: ⚡ GAIN +1    6⚡ TAKE THE SPOTLIGHT
spotlight_tt-u:
This extremely precious resource allows you to become the center of attention and surprise everyone with your action, with no need for rolling dice or taking chances. You can have up to 3 Spotlights at the same time, and can spend one to:
♦ Get an Extreme Success automatically, instead of rolling the dice.
♦ Save a Friend who has lost at the Death Roulette. Your friend adds another Lethal Bullet to their roulette, but at least they won’t be dead.
♦ Remove a Condition of any kind, including Broken.
♦ Save a Ride when it’s about to be destroyed.
♦ Do whatever you want. If you want to do something that you couldn’t, discuss it with the Director. If you both agree, the Spotlight makes everything possible!

The Director can grant you a Spotlight as a reward for a genius, crazy, or mind-blowing move. Bonus points if you called into play your Catchphrase or, even better, your Flaw.
roulette_tt-u:
This extremely precious resource allows you to become the center of attention and surprise everyone with your action, with no need for rolling dice or taking chances. You can have up to 3 Spotlights at the same time, and can spend one to:
♦ Get an Extreme Success automatically, instead of rolling the dice.
♦ Save a Friend who has lost at the Death Roulette. Your friend adds another Lethal Bullet to their roulette, but at least they won’t be dead.
♦ Remove a Condition of any kind, including Broken.
♦ Save a Ride when it’s about to be destroyed.
♦ Do whatever you want. If you want to do something that you couldn’t, discuss it with the Director. If you both agree, the Spotlight makes everything possible!

The Director can grant you a Spotlight as a reward for a genius, crazy, or mind-blowing move. Bonus points if you called into play your Catchphrase or, even better, your Flaw.
feats-u: FEATSWhen diving into the action, you can rely on 3 Feats chosen among the ones for your Role and Trope. Most Feats grant you a Free Re-roll when you act in a specific way. This greatly increases your chances of success. Other Feats will allow you to take special actions or grant you other advantages, allowing your Hero to stand out from the crowd.
superpower-u: SUPERPOWERAll Heroes can rely on an incredible Superpower tied to their Origin. When you pick a Role, you immediately gain a specific Superpower that allows you to do incredible things, and to face any super-villain who dares to stand between you and the safety of the Universe. Superpowers are a unique and more powerful variant of Feats. Your Superpower grants you passive skills that you can always rely on. Some Superpowers also grant you super weapons, like kinetic or energy beams. Additionally, some Superpowers allow you to spend Power (⚡) to take special actions. Most special actions are instantaneous, while others require a Quick Action or a Full Turn in order to be activated. Remember that, while in combat, you can take a free Quick Action either before or after rolling the dice. If you use your Full Turn to activate a Superpower, on the other hand, you cannot take other actions or make an Action Roll.
experiences-u: EXPERIENCESThe life of a superhero won’t stop at covering you in bruises and scrapes, it will also leave you permanently changed by many Experiences. While playing superheroes you have a chance to collect Experiences that will influence your dice rolls either positively or negatively.
your4thcondition-u:
YOUR 4TH CONDITION IS ALWAYS BROKEN ● WHEN EXHAUSTED YOU CAN’T GAIN OR SPEND POWER
WHEN POWERLESS YOU CAN’T SPEND POWER, AND CAN’T USE YOUR SUPERPOWER AND THE FEATS  CONNECTED TO IT
conditions_tt-u:
In the You Look section of your Sheet, you
can note down the Conditions you get on
your mission.
Conditions impose -1 to specific dice rolls, and
can be accumulated as consequence of your
failures.
gunsngear_tt-u:
There are two kinds of useful items: Weapons and Gear.
If you can rely on a Helpful item of Gear, the Director can grant you one of the following benefits, depending on the circumstances:
♦ GAIN +1 to a roll
♦ GAIN A SUCCESS automatically, without rolling the dice
♦ GAIN THE REQUISITES for a roll that would otherwise be impossible
ride_tt-u:
Speed races and thrilling chases are an everyday occurrence in the life of a Hero. As such, it’s essential that you procure at least one ride worthy of the name, as well as someone who can drive it.
Rides have 4 main features:
♦ Name: The make and model, or nickname of the ride.
♦ Type: Car, motorbike, boat, helicopter/plane, or armored vehicle.
♦ Speed: Value 1 to 3, represents your starting Speed in a chase.
♦ Armor: Represents how many hits the ride can sustain before blowing up.
cash_tt-u:
You will begin the game with a set number of Cash points. Cash represents the money you can easily access and will be instrumental to allow you to buy gear or information, and to bribe people.
Usually, an item or service will have a cost of 1 to 3 Cash
powertiertext-u: CHOOSE A POWER TIER TO DETERMINE THE SCALE OF YOUR POWERS AND OF YOUR MISSION
villaindetails-u: THE DIRECTOR GAINS ONE HEAT POINT WHEN THE HEAT RISES TO 6, 9, AND 12.
